result:
[[B4]]

to: Dan Marsh <info@example.com>
subject: Good to meet you at the exchange

Dan,

Good to meet you at the Coastal Collective exchange. I enjoyed the conversation, the Snowcap story most of all. A white whale for a trademark is not something you come across twice.

Thank you too for being so open about how it all works for you. I was grateful for the straight talk from someone who has been at it a while.

If you and the family are ever over our way, come out to Hillside Farm for a ride and a wander around the place. You would be very welcome.

Sam
